_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in your battery MACs (see README: 'Find your batteries'). The advertised name is usually the battery serial; use it to match each MAC to a physical pack.
_device_defaults_comment: manufacturer/model shown on the HA device page. Applied to every pack unless a battery overrides 'manufacturer'/'model' itself. The pack serial is appended to model automatically. Whole section is optional.
